2024

Smith J., Jones A.B. (2024). A Great Paper on Bioelectricity. Nature, 123(4): 56-78. doi: 10.1038/example001. PDF

This paper investigates the role of bioelectric signals in cellular decision-making during embryonic development, demonstrating that ion-channel manipulation can redirect organ patterning in a predictable and heritable manner.

Garcia M., Lee K., Patel R. (2024). Collective Intelligence in Planaria Regeneration. Cell, 187(3): 101-115. doi: 10.1016/j.cell.2024.01.005. PDF

2023

Brown C. (2023). Morphogenetic Fields in March 2023. Science, 100(2): March 2023, 10-20. doi: 10.1126/science.abc123. PDF

White E., Black F. (2023). Synthetic Xenobots With Emergent Behaviour. doi: 10.1234/xenobots.2023.
